citations.finding: Process rundll32.exe accessed lsass.exe memory (PID 4812). Pattern consistent with credential dumping (T1003.001). Parent process: cmd.exe spawned from scheduled task at 03:14 UTC.
Mimikatz-style sekurlsa::logonpasswords invocation signature detected in command-line arguments. High-confidence credential theft attempt.
No extractable network IOC in alert text; host-based event only. VirusTotal and AbuseIPDB lookups not applicable.

blind_spots.reason: Coverage gap — no network IOC present in alert; VirusTotal and AbuseIPDB could not be queried
blind_spots.next_step: Capture full memory dump from affected host and re-run analysis with extracted hashes
